subcodes.first_line: In this divine age the bounties of God have encompassed the world of women.  Equality of men and women, except in some negligible instances, has been fully and categorically announced.  Distinctions have been utterly removed.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنات ملکوت ورقه رحمانیه امة الله بنت ذبیح بیاد شما افتاد و ذکر شما را در
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @role and station of women, @equality of men and women, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
